title.ko: 펩티드 (Peptides) (β-락탐고리 함유 펩티드 C07D; 환식 디펩티드에 있어서 그 분자중에 환을 형성하는 펩티드 결합이외의 펩티드결합을 갖지 않는 것, 예. 피페라진-2.5-디온 C07D; 환식 펩티드형의 맥각알칼로이드 C07D 519/02519/02; 단세포 단백질, 효소 C12N; 펩티드를 얻기 위한 유전 공학 공정 C12N 15/00)
title.en: PEPTIDES (peptides containing β-lactam rings C07D;cyclic dipeptides not having in their molecule any other peptide link than those which form their ring, e.g. piperazine-2,5-diones, C07D;ergot alkaloids of the cyclic peptide type C07D0519020000; single cell proteins, enzymes C12N;genetic engineering processes for obtaining peptides C12N0015000000)

definition.ko: 펩티드 제법 C07K1/00 불확정 개수의 아미노산을 가진 것 C07K2/00 불확정 또는 단지 부분적으로만 확정된 배열을 가진 20개이하의 아미노산을 가진 것 C07K4/00 완전히 확정된 배열을 가진 아미노산을 20개 이하 갖는 것 C07K5/00 ~ C07K9/00 완전히 확정된 배열을 가진 아미노산을 20개 이하 갖는 뎁시 펩티드 C07K11/00 20개이상의 아미노산을 갖는 것 C07K14/00 면역글로불린 C07K16/00 담체결합 또는 고정화된 펩티드 C07K17/00 하이브리드펩티드 C07K19/00

title.en: General processes for the preparation of peptides
using protecting groups or activating agents
by chemical modification of precursor peptides
without change of the primary structure
Partition-, reverse-phase or hydrophobic interaction chromatography
Affinity chromatography or related techniques based upon selective absorption processes
by filtration, ultrafiltration or reverse osmosis
by a combination of two or more processes of different types
Peptides of undefined number of amino acids; Derivatives thereof
Peptides having up to 20 amino acids in an undefined or only partially defined sequence; Derivatives thereof
Peptides having up to four amino acids in a fully defined sequence; Derivatives thereof
containing at least one abnormal peptide link
in which at least a beta-amino acid is involved
in which at least a gamma-amino acid is involved, e.g. statine
in which at least a delta-amino acid is involved, e.g. isosteres
in which at least an epsilon- or zeta-amino acid is involved
the abnormal link being formed by the side chain of an alpha-amino acid, e.g. gamma-Glu, epsilon-Lys, glutathione
the side chain of the first amino acid being acyclic, e.g. Gly, Ala
the side chain of the first amino acid containing carbocyclic rings, e.g. Phe, Tyr
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more amino groups than carboxyl groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Lys, Arg
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more carboxyl groups than amino groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Asp, Glu, Asn
the first amino acid being heterocyclic, e.g. Pro, His, Trp

the side chain of the first amino acid containing carbocyclic rings, e.g. Phe, Tyr
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more amino groups than carboxyl groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Lys, Arg
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more carboxyl groups than amino groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Asp, Glu, Asn
the first amino acid being heterocyclic, e.g. Pro, His, Trp, e.g. thyroliberin, melanostatin
the side chain of the first amino acid being acyclic, e.g. Gly, Ala
the side chain of the first amino acid containing carbocyclic rings, e.g. Phe, Tyr
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more amino groups than carboxyl groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Lys, Arg
the side chain of the first amino acid containing more carboxyl groups than amino groups, or derivatives thereof, e.g. Asp, Glu, Asn
the first amino acid being heterocyclic, e.g. Pro, His, Trp

title.ko: 그 유도체; 배열이 완전히 확정된 아미노산을 5 ～20개 갖는 펩티드
title.en: Peptides having 5 to 20 amino acids in a fully defined sequence; Derivatives thereof
Linear peptides containing at least one abnormal peptide link
Linear peptides containing only normal peptide links

title.ko: 그라미시딘(Gramicidins) A, B, D 관련된 펩티드
title.en: Gramicidins A, B, D; Related peptides
Cyclic peptides containing at least one abnormal peptide link
with only normal peptide links in the ring
with at least one abnormal peptide link in the ring
the cyclisation not occurring through 2,4-diamino-butanoic acid
the cyclisation occurring through the 4-amino group of 2,4-diamino-butanoic acid
Cyclic peptides containing only normal peptide links

title.ko: 그라미시딘(Gramicidins) S,C; 티로시딘(Tyrocidins) A,B,C 관련된 펩티드
title.en: Gramicidins S, C; Tyrocidins A, B, C; Related peptides
Peptides having up to 20 amino acids, containing saccharide radicals and having a fully defined sequence; Derivatives thereof
Depsipeptides having up to 20 amino acids in a fully defined sequence; Derivatives thereof

title.ko: 20이상의 아미노산을 갖는 펩티드; 가스트린(Gastrins); 소마토스타틴(Somatostatins); 멜라노트로핀(Melanotropins); 그 유도체
title.en: Peptides having more than 20 amino acids; Gastrins; Somatostatins; Melanotropins; Derivatives thereof
Parvoviridae, e.g. feline panleukopenia virus, human parvovirus
Papovaviridae, e.g. papillomavirus, polyomavirus, SV40, BK virus, JC virus
Herpes simplex virus I or II

title.ko: 피코르나비리데(Picornaviridae), 예. 콕사키에(coxsackie) 바이러스, 에코바이러스(echovirus), 엔터로바이러스(enterovirus)
title.en: Picornaviridae, e.g. coxsackie virus, echovirus, enterovirus
Reoviridae, e.g. rotavirus, bluetongue virus, Colorado tick fever virus
Rhabdoviridae, e.g. rabies virus, Duvenhage virus, Mokola virus or vesicular stomatitis virus
Retroviridae, e.g. bovine leukaemia virus, feline leukaemia virus, human T-cell leukaemia-lymphoma virus
Lentiviridae, e.g. human immunodeficiency virus [HIV], visna-maedi virus or equine infectious anaemia virus
Coronaviridae, e.g. avian infectious bronchitis virus
Bunyaviridae, e.g. California encephalitis virus, Rift valley fever virus, Hantaan virus

title.ko: 토가비리대(Togaviridae), 예. 플라비(flavi) 바이러스, 페스티(pesti) 바이러스, 황열(yellow fever) 바이러스, C형간염 바이러스, 일본치염 바이러스(Japanese Encephalitis virus
title.en: Togaviridae, e.g. flavivirus, pestivirus, yellow fever virus, hepatitis C virus, japanese encephalitis virus

definition.ko: 그룹 C07K14/20 ~ C07K14/365에서, 적절한 경우, 박테리아 용어 다음에 박테리아의 목(O), 과(F), 속(G)의 표시는 괄호안에 표시됩니다.

title.ko: 엔테로박테리아세아에(Enterobacteriaceae)로부터 유도된 것(F), 예. 시트로박터(Citrobacter), 세라티아(Serratia), 프로테우스(proteus), 프로비덴시아(Providencia), 모르가넬라(Morganella), 예르시니아(Yersinia)
title.en: from Enterobacteriaceae (F), e.g. Citrobacter, Serratia, Proteus, Providencia, Morganella, Yersinia

title.ko: 파스튜렐라세아에(Pasteurellaceae)로부터 유도된 것(F), 예. 해모필루스 인플루엔자(Haemophilus influenza)

title.en: Bacillus thuringiensis crystal peptides, i.e. delta-endotoxins
Bone morphogenic factor; Osteogenin; Osteogenic factor; Bone-inducing factor
Atrial natriuretic factor complex; Atriopeptin; Atrial natriuretic peptide [ANP]; Cardionatrin; Cardiodilatin
Follicle-stimulating hormone [FSH]; Chorionic gonadotropins, e.g. hCG [human chorionic gonadotropin]; Luteinising hormone [LH]; Thyroid-stimulating hormone [TSH]
Parathyroid hormone, i.e. parathormone; Parathyroid hormone-related peptides
Insulin-like growth factors, i.e. somatomedins, e.g. IGF-1, IGF-2
derived from pro-opiomelanocortin, pro-enkephalin or pro-dynorphin
Receptors; Cell surface antigens; Cell surface determinants
for growth factors; for growth regulators
for cytokines; for lymphokines; for interferons
Connective tissue peptides, e.g. collagen, elastin, laminin, fibronectin, vitronectin or cold insoluble globulin [CIG]
Alveolar surfactant peptides; Pulmonary surfactant peptides

title.ko: 면역글로불린 [IG], 예. 단일클론 또는 다중클론 항체
title.en: Immunoglobulins [IG], e.g. monoclonal or polyclonal antibodies

definition.ko: 이 메인그룹에서 적절한 경우 바이러스 또는 박테리아 용어 뒤에 목 (O), 과 (F) 또는 속 (G)을 괄호 안에 표시한다.

title.ko: 파필로마바이러스과 (F); 폴리오마바이러스과 (F), 예. SV40, BK 바이러스 또는 JC 바이러스
title.en: Papillomaviridae (F); Polyomaviridae (F), e.g. SV40, BK virus or JC virus

title.ko: 오르토헤르페스바이러스과 (F), 예. 가성 광견병 바이러스 또는 엡스타인-바 바이러스
title.en: Orthoherpesviridae (F), e.g. pseudorabies virus or Epstein-Barr virus

title.ko: 파라믹소바이러스과 (F); 뉴모바이러스과 (F), 예. 호흡기 세포융합 바이러스 [RSV]
title.en: Paramyxoviridae (F); Pneumoviridae (F), e.g. respiratory syncytial virus [RSV]

title.ko: 렌티바이러스속 (G), 예. 인간 면역결핍 바이러스 [HIV], 고양이 면역결핍 바이러스 [FIV] 또는 원숭이 면역결핍 바이러스 [SIV]
title.en: Lentivirus (G), e.g. human immunodeficiency virus [HIV], feline immunodeficiency virus [FIV] or simian immunodeficiency virus [SIV]

title.ko: C형 간염 바이러스; GB 바이러스 C [GBV-C]
title.en: Hepatitis C virus; GB virus C [GBV-C]

title.ko: 장내세균목 (O), 예. 시트로박터속 (G), 세라티아속 (G), 프로테우스속 (G), 프로비덴시아속 (G), 모르가넬라속 (G) 또는 예르시니아속 (G)
title.en: Enterobacterales (O), e.g. Citrobacter (G), Serratia (G), Proteus (G), Providencia (G), Morganella (G) or Yersinia (G)
against material from fungi, algae or lichens
against material from animals or humans
against receptors, cell surface antigens or cell surface determinants
against protease inhibitors of peptide structure
against material not provided for elsewhere

title.ko: 혼성 면역글로불린(면역 글로블린이 아닌 펩티드와 면역 글로블린의 하이브리드 C07K 19/00)
title.en: Hybrid immunoglobulins (hybrids of an immunoglobulin with a peptide not being an immunoglobulin C07K0019000000)
Carrier-bound or immobilised peptides; Preparation thereof
Peptides being immobilised on, or in, an organic carrier
entrapped within the carrier, e.g. gel, hollow fibre
attached to the carrier via a bridging agent
the carrier being a synthetic polymer
Peptides being immobilised on, or in, an inorganic carrier

title.ko: 혼성 펩티드(면역글로불린으로만 이루어진 혼성 면역글로불린 C07K 16/46)
title.en: Hybrid peptides (hybrid immunoglobulins composed solely of immunoglobulins C07K0016460000)
